AnalysisHistory.title: Analysis History
AnalysisHistory.description: Stores the history of template analysis runs for each user.

userId.description: The unique ID of the user who performed the analysis.

fileName.description: The name of the uploaded file.

timestamp.description: The time when the analysis was performed.

sensitiveCount.description: Total number of sensitive variables found.

data.description: JSON stringified raw data for the analysis.
